home.title: Get Your Allergo Test
home.box1_text: ImmunoLab securely collects, standardizes, and manages laboratory and clinical data for healthcare teams and researchers.
home.box2_text: Order online, walk into any of our 13 Almaty branches, and receive your structured IgE panel results the same afternoon.
home.box3_text: Every test is logged, structured, and waiting in your personal dashboard. Download, share with your doctor, or track over time.
home.what_we_do_text: We securely collect, standardize, and deliver laboratory results, enabling healthcare teams and patients with clean, structured data they can actually use.
home.what_we_do_h1_text: Encrypted lab & clinical data capture across all 13 branch locations.
home.what_we_do_h2_text: Standardized formats that improve accuracy and eliminate transcription errors.
home.what_we_do_h3_text: Real-time secure access to results for patients and clinicians alike.
home.process_text: From sameple to screen in hours.
home.process_subheading1_text: Select your allergen panel through our portal. Same-day appointments available at all 13 branches.
home.process_subheading2_text: Visit any branch. A qualified nurse collects your blood sample -- quick, clean, clinical.
home.process_subheading3_text: Your sample is processed in our certified immunology lab using IgE-specific testing methodology.
home.process_subheading4_text: Structured results delivered securely to your account. Download, share, or discuss with your doctor.
home.result_subtext: Every test result is structured, annotated, and immediately readable. No jargon. No guesswork. Share directly with your specialist. Get your test
home.quote: ImmunoLab has fundamentally changed how I communicate allergy data to my patients. Results arrive structured, annotated, and ready to act on -- no transcription, no ambiguity.
home.improve: Ready to improve your clinical workflow?

contact_us.contact_text: We're happy to answer questions about your tests or results.
contact_us.banner_text: Results are issued same day for samples submitted before 12:00 noon. Samples received after 12:00 will be ready the next business day.

about.desc: A modern diagnostic laboratory in Almaty specializing in express allergy testing for local anesthetics and antibiotics — with industry-leading accuracy and same-day results.
about.about_h1: Precision allergy diagnostics you can rely on
about.about_h1_text1: AllergoExpress Immunolab is a specialized medical laboratory focused on the express diagnosis of allergic reactions to local anesthetics and antibiotics. We work closely with clinics, dentists, and individual patients across Almaty to provide timely, accurate results that directly inform treatment decisions.
about.about_h1_text2: Allergic reactions to anesthetics and antibiotics can be life-threatening if not identified in advance. Our mission is to eliminate that uncertainty — quickly, reliably, and at a price that doesn't create barriers to care.
about.about_banner: All testing is performed using the ELISA method — an internationally recognized immunological technique offering sensitivity and specificity that surpass many conventional allergy skin tests.
about.list1: Our laboratory uses enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) — one of the most reliable methods available for allergen detection.
about.list2: Conveniently located across the city so you can access our services without long commutes.
about.list3: Our goal is to make professional allergy diagnosis accessible to everyone — without compromising quality.
about.spec_list_text4: Results issued on the day of sampling (before 12:00)

account.title: My Test Orders
account.description: Manage your test orders. Review upcoming, current and past test orders to stay informed about potential allergies and recommended medications.
account.verifyEmail: Please verify your email address to access all features.

order.test1: Articaine Hydrochloride 4%, Huons Co., Ltd., Korea
order.desc1: Local anesthetic commonly used for dental procedures.
order.desc2: Anesthetic with vasoconstrictor for longer-lasting effect.
order.desc3: Intermediate-acting local anesthetic for minor dental treatments.
order.desc5: Milder epinephrine content for sensitive patients.
order.test6: Septanest with Adrenaline 1:100 000, Blue, Septodont, France
order.desc6: High potency dental anesthetic with adrenaline.
order.test7: Septanest with Adrenaline 1:200 000, Green, Septodont, France
order.desc7: Lower adrenaline concentration for safer use.
order.desc9: Standard dental anesthetic with moderate potency.
order.desc10: Rapid onset anesthetic for minor dental work.
order.desc11: Commonly used local anesthetic, moderate duration.
order.desc13: Older anesthetic, mild effect, limited use today.
order.desc19: Antibiotic for respiratory and skin infections.
